svg.title: GCS Local-To-Global Constraint Solving
svg.text: Structural source: Mermaid architecture atlas. Data panels generated from a scene fixture.

g.text: hyperedges preserve stable IDs before solving
numeric evidence is a report, not a commit
Each stage contributes typed evidence or a typed rejection.
A local numeric section is never a durable commit by itself.

svg.text: Design claim: GCS accepts only globally verified proposals whose local sections glue over declared overlaps.
Geometry, incidence, residuals, rank, gluing, and transaction status are all first-class reports.
